channel.title: Search Engine on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Search Engine on Alien Truth Social

item.title: The Black Vault Launches Searchable UFO Files Release Archive
item.description:
The Black Vault has launched a new searchable archive for the recently released UFO Files Release #1 collection. This archive, built on a custom search engine, makes the government’s UAP document release more accessible than the original format. The Black Vault processed the files to remove password restrictions and improve searchability, including generating searchable text from documents. The platform offers direct access to records, with features like searchable PDFs, videos, and metadata, and will expand as new UAP records are released.

Source: https://www.theblackvault.com/documentarchive/the-black-vault-launches-searchable-ufo-files-release-archive
